top_signals.title: Oil Slips, US Stock Futures Rise on Iran Optimism: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil dropped and US equity-index futures edged up after President Donald Trump said he was holding off on fresh military strikes, boosting hopes for a deal that could end the war and revive energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
